---
title: "Bioprocessing"
subtitle: "An overview of Upstream and Downstream Processing"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: custom-light.scss
    css: [timer.css]
    preview-links: false
    incremental: true
    chalkboard: 
      buttons: false
    auto-animate-easing: ease-in-out
    auto-animate-unmatched: true
    auto-animate-duration: 0.8
    menu:
      side: right
      width: half
from: markdown+emoji
author: 
  - name: Colton Baumler
    orcid: 0000-0002-5926-7792
    email: ccbaumler@ucdavis.edu
    affiliations: University of California, Davis
date: last-modified
date-format: "dddd, [the] D[<sup style='font-size:65%;font-style:italic;'>th</sup>] [of] MMMM, YYYY"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Learning Objectives

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(countdown)
```

1. Modeling the overall process
2. Define Bioprocessing
3. Understand the variety of biological systems and products
4. Critically evaluate process requirements

# Modeling the Overall Process

## In a single word, write a theme for each quote?

### Modeling the Overall Process

```{r}
#| echo: false
countdown::countdown(minutes = 1, seconds = 0, warn_when = 15, 
                     right = "0%", top = "10%",
                     blink_colon = TRUE,
                     play_sound = "audio/smb_coin.wav",
                     id = "special_timer")
```

::: {.fragment}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
#### Everything is everywhere, but the environment selects.

- Baas Becking
  - Plant physiologist
    - *Geobiology*
- ***Growth***

:::

::: {.column width="1%"}
:::

::: {.column width="47.5%" style="border-left: 2px solid grey; padding-left: 1%;"}
#### Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.

- Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
  - Writer and Aviator
    - *Wind, Sand, and Stars*
- ***Refinement***

:::

::::

:::

## Growth and Refinement define Bioprocessing

### Modeling the Overall Process

![Painted by David Goodsell. The composition of macromolecules is depicted to scale, with an effort to show the impact of native concentrations of macromolecules on the environment; Histone Like Proteins in Gold, white strands are mRNA, purple are ribosomes, and enzymes are in blue.](./images/mage-was-painted-by-David-Goodsell-downloaded-from.jpeg)

## Before bioprocesses, what are processes?

### Modeling the Overall Process

<style>
/* The animated oval and line */
.bio-overlay {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 2px solid red;
  border-radius: 50px;
  padding: 0.2em 0.5em; /* Starting padding */
  transition: all 0.8s ease-in-out;
  background: linear-gradient(transparent 48%, red 48%, red 52%, transparent 52%) no-repeat;
  background-size: 0% 100%; /* Line starts hidden */
}

/* When the fragment triggers, the overlay shrinks and the line draws */
.fragment.visible .bio-overlay {
  padding: 0.1em 0.3em; 
  background-size: 100% 100%;
}
</style>

::: {.center-xy}
::: {.r-stack}

[Bioprocess]{style="font-size: 2em; opacity: 1;"}

::: {.fragment}
[ [Bio]{.bio-overlay}process ]{style="font-size: 3em; background: white;"}
:::

:::
:::

# Defining Bioprocessing

::: notes
Applications in pharma, science, biofuel, vaccine, and food products

This is how we make vitamins, insulin, biofuel, growth hormones, anitbiotics
:::

## What is Bioprocessing? {auto-animate="true"}

### Defining Bioprocessing

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em; margin-top: 2em;"}
> A technique to use [biological resources]{data-id="res" style="color: red;"} to create and isolate [products]{data-id="pro" style="color: red;"}.
:::

## What is Bioprocessing? {auto-animate="true"}

### Defining Bioprocessing

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em; opacity: 0.3;"}
> A technique to use [biological resources]{data-id="res" style="color: red;"} to create and isolate [products]{data-id="pro" style="color: red;"}.
:::


### Key Components:

::: {.nonincremental}

* [Biological Resources]{data-id="res" style="color: red; font-weight: bold;"}
    * [Bacterial, mammalian, or plant cells]{.fragment}
    * [Viruses]{.fragment}
    * [Cell-free systems]{.fragment}
* [Products]{data-id="pro" style="color: red; font-weight: bold;"}
    * [Antibodies, proteins, and metabolites]{.fragment}
    * [Applications in pharma, science, biofuel, vaccine, and food products]{.fragment}

:::

# Understand the variety of biological systems and products



# Critically evaluate process requirements

# Appendix

# Glossary
